description: Shared mutation policy — single source of truth for which tools and bridge endpoints mutate state, their risk tier, and their guard requirements. Read by the Python interceptor (advisory smart layer, fabrication_mcp/mutation_policy.py) and, as write endpoints land, by the C# bridge floor (hard boundary). Neither enforcer hardcodes rules. Private builds may extend this at boot via mutation_policy.register_tool().

risk_tiers.safe: Reversible or ephemeral; executes immediately, no confirmation.
risk_tiers.guarded: Mutates user-visible state; requires confirm=true on the call.
risk_tiers.dangerous: Irreversible or cascading; requires confirm=true and is rejected unless the policy explicitly enables it (reserved for future write tiers).

live_swap_job_item.note: Modifies the active AutoCAD drawing. Reversible via live_undo_swap.

live_undo_swap.note: Reverses the last swap; is itself the undo operation.

live_export_cache.note: Writes fresh CSV exports and reloads server caches; output is regenerable.

refresh_cache.note: Clears in-memory caches; next query reloads from disk.

switch_profile.note: Changes the active data context; reversible by switching back.

sync_profile_with_bridge.note: May switch the active profile and triggers a bridge cache refresh.

est_load_job.note: Writes the local estimates SQLite database; jobs are reloadable from their source export files.
